criterion: Project picker scale — no search/filter for 200+ options
description: With 203 folders known to Claude Code, the project picker is a single flat native <select> with well over 150 options, many with near-identical or generic path fragments (e.g. many '~/conductor/workspaces/agent-university/<city>' entries, and a long tail of 0-session hashed temp-dir names). Finding a specific folder among 200+ undifferentiated options is tedious.
expected: Some grouping, recency ordering, or type-to-filter affordance for a picker with this many options (per the catalog's own noted gap in STORY-002/003).
actual: Flat alphabetically-ish ordered list (actually appears to be by first-seen/registration order, not alphabetical or recency), no filter box, no favorites.
suggested_fix: Native <datalist>/combobox with type-ahead filtering, or group by recency vs. long-tail 0-session entries.
